disallowed_outputs: approving redemption cash release solely because investor pressure or portfolio-manager urgency is high
treating preliminary administrator comments or derived tables as official NAV strike authority
treating holding notice, final NAV statement, side-letter notice, and wire release as the same action
claiming liquidity gates, side-letter review, official NAV, valuation approval, treasury approval, or legal review are complete without packet evidence
generic wait-for-approval advice without wire, NAV, holding notice, liquidity, side-letter, mark, receivable, and approval stop/go triggers
